odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
            
            

                
                
                Memory Usage Visualization
                
                
            
            
                
                

                
                    const rawData = JSON.parse(atob(''))
                    function formatBytes(bytes) {
                        if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
                        const k = 1024;
                        const sizes = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
                        const i = Math.floor(Math.log(Math.abs(bytes)) / Math.log(k));
                        const value = bytes / Math.pow(k, i);
                        return `${value.toFixed(1)} ${sizes[i]}`;
                    }

                    const totalSizes = rawData.map(list =>
                        list.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + entry.size, 0)
                    );

                    const lineLabels = rawData.map((_, i) => `List ${i + 1}`);

                    const ctxLine = document.getElementById('totalMemoryChart');
                    const ctxBar = document.getElementById('memoryChart').getContext('2d');
                    let selectedIndexes = [];

                    const updateBarChart = () => {
                        const datasets = [];

                        if (selectedIndexes.length === 1) {
                            const data = rawData[selectedIndexes[0]];
                            datasets.push({
                                label: `Breakdown for List ${selectedIndexes[0] + 1}`,
                                data: data.map(e => e.size),
                                backgroundColor: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 0.6)',
                                borderColor: 'rgba(54, 162, 235, 1)',
                                borderWidth: 1
                            });

                            breakdownChart.data.labels = data.map(e => `${e.file[0]}:${e.file[1]}`);
                            breakdownChart.data.datasets = datasets;
                            breakdownChart.options.plugins.datalabels.display = true;
                            breakdownChart.options.plugins.datalabels.formatter = (value, context) => formatBytes(value);
                            breakdownChart.update();

                        } else if (selectedIndexes.length === 2) {
                            const [idx1, idx2] = selectedIndexes;

                            const data1 = rawData[idx1];
                            const data2 = rawData[idx2];

                            const labelSet = new Set([
                                ...data1.map(e => `${e.file[0]}:${e.file[1]}`),
                                ...data2.map(e => `${e.file[0]}:${e.file[1]}`)
                            ]);

                            let diffData = [];

                            labelSet.forEach(label => {
                                const entry1 = data1.find(e => `${e.file[0]}:${e.file[1]}` === label);
                                const entry2 = data2.find(e => `${e.file[0]}:${e.file[1]}` === label);
                                const size1 = entry1 ? entry1.size : 0;
                                const size2 = entry2 ? entry2.size : 0;
                                const diff = size2 - size1;
                                if (diff !== 0) {
                                    diffData.push({ label, diff });
                                }
                            });

                            diffData.sort((a, b) => b.diff - a.diff);

                            breakdownChart.data.labels = diffData.map(e => e.label);
                            breakdownChart.data.datasets = [{
                                label: `Difference (List ${idx2 + 1} - List ${idx1 + 1})`,
                                data: diffData.map(e => e.diff),
                                backgroundColor: diffData.map(e => e.diff >= 0 ? 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 0.6)' : 'rgba(255, 99, 132, 0.6)'),
                                borderColor: diffData.map(e => e.diff >= 0 ? 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 1)' : 'rgba(255, 99, 132, 1)'),
                                borderWidth: 1
                            }];

                            breakdownChart.options.plugins.datalabels.display = true;
                            breakdownChart.options.plugins.datalabels.formatter = (value) => formatBytes(value);
                            breakdownChart.update();
                        } else {
                            breakdownChart.data.labels = [];
                            breakdownChart.data.datasets = [];
                            breakdownChart.update();
                        }

                        totalChart.update();
                    };

                    const totalChart = new Chart(ctxLine.getContext('2d'), {
                        type: 'line',
                        data: {
                            labels: lineLabels,
                            datasets: [{
                                label: 'Total Memory Usage',
                                data: totalSizes,
                                fill: false,
                                borderColor: 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 1)',
                                tension: 0.1,
                                pointBackgroundColor: (ctx) => selectedIndexes.includes(ctx.dataIndex) ? 'rgba(255, 99, 132, 1)' : 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 1)',
                                pointRadius: (ctx) => selectedIndexes.includes(ctx.dataIndex) ? 7 : 4,
                                pointBorderWidth: (ctx) => selectedIndexes.includes(ctx.dataIndex) ? 3 : 1
                            }]
                        },
                        options: {
                            responsive: true,
                            plugins: {
                                title: {
                                    display: true,
                                    text: 'Total Memory Usage Over Time'
                                },
                                tooltip: {
                                    callbacks: {
                                        label: (context) => `Total: ${formatBytes(context.raw)}`
                                    }
                                }
                            },
                            onClick: (evt, elements) => {
                                if (elements.length === 0) {
                                    selectedIndexes = [];
                                } else {
                                    const idx = elements[0].index;
                                    if (evt.native.shiftKey) {
                                        if (!selectedIndexes.includes(idx)) {
                                            selectedIndexes.push(idx);
                                        }
                                    } else {
                                        selectedIndexes = [idx];
                                    }
                                    if (selectedIndexes.length > 2) {
                                        selectedIndexes = selectedIndexes.slice(-2);
                                    }
                                }
                                updateBarChart();
                            },
                            scales: {
                                y: {
                                    beginAtZero: true,
                                    ticks: {
                                        callback: formatBytes
                                    },
                                    title: {
                                        display: true,
                                        text: 'Total Memory'
                                    }
                                },
                                x: {
                                    title: {
                                        display: true,
                                        text: 'Lists'
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    });

                    const breakdownChart = new Chart(ctxBar, {
                        type: 'bar',
                        data: {
                            labels: [],
                            datasets: []
                        },
                        options: {
                            indexAxis: 'y',
                            responsive: true,
                            plugins: {
                                legend: { display: false },
                                title: {
                                    display: true,
                                    text: 'Breakdown by File:Line'
                                },
                                tooltip: {
                                    callbacks: {
                                        label: (context) => `${context.dataset.label}: ${formatBytes(context.raw)}`
                                    }
                                },
                                datalabels: {
                                    anchor: 'end',
                                    align: 'right',
                                    color: '#000',
                                    font: {
                                        weight: 'bold'
                                    },
                                    formatter: (value) => formatBytes(value),
                                    display: true
                                }
                            },
                            scales: {
                                x: {
                                    beginAtZero: true,
                                    ticks: {
                                        callback: formatBytes
                                    },
                                    title: {
                                        display: true,
                                        text: 'Memory Usage'
                                    }
                                },
                                y: {
                                    title: {
                                        display: true,
                                        text: 'File:Line'
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        plugins: [ChartDataLabels]
                    });

                    updateBarChart();
